description: Live SOC with PagerDuty/Opsgenie routing, impossible-travel detection, abnormal capital alerts, key rotation enforcement

severity_matrix.SEV1: Data exfiltration / tenant leakage / >€50K anomaly → IMMEDIATE PagerDuty
severity_matrix.SEV2: Auth anomaly / key overdue >30d / impossible travel → PagerDuty
severity_matrix.SEV3: Abnormal capital 2-3x / key rotation due → Slack alert

rules: Forensic snapshots are immutable — no updates after creation
SEV1 always triggers PagerDuty regardless of business hours
Impossible travel >800km/h triggers forensic snapshot + alert
